must_detect.matched_text: Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Controlling Interest in Mabuhay AgroTech, Inc. (PH SEC Reg. No.: CRN-2026-QZ-918273)
Regulatory conditions: Closing subject to PH SEC clearance (SRC Rule 19 tender-offer exemption), BSP approval for FX remittance, and PSE confirmation of no trading suspension
Disclosure: The information herein constitutes material non-public information under the SRC; issuer to file SEC Form 17-C via eFAST within 1 business day following definitive agreement execution

Covenants pre-closing: No dividends or extraordinary expenses > PHP 5,000,000 without Buyer’s written consent; capex > PHP 20,000,000 requires prior approval; no related-party transactions outside ordinary course

Closing mechanics: Closing within 60 days of satisfactory due diligence; closing at Luntian Capital offices (Unit 8F, Talanghari Tower, Quezon City) or via electronic closing; wire instructions to be confirmed by call-back
Exclusivity and expenses: 45-day exclusivity from countersignature; each party bears its own costs; break fee of PHP 12,500,000 payable by Seller for willful breach of exclusivity

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Purchase of 60% of outstanding common shares
restrict use of MNPI to external advisors bound by NDA
Unit 8F, Talanghari Tower, 2456 Salakot Street, Brgy. Malaya, Quezon City 1102, Philippines
